obtain_diamond.goal: You are playing survival Minecraft from scratch with an empty inventory. Your objective is to obtain a diamond. Work up the tech tree: punch trees for wood, craft a crafting table and a wooden pickaxe, mine stone and craft a stone pickaxe, find and mine iron ore, build a furnace and smelt the iron, craft an iron pickaxe, then dig down to around Y=-59 and mine a diamond. Keep making steady progress and narrate what you are doing.
